headline: FactSet Expands AI Banking Tools As Investors Weigh Margins And Stickiness
summary: FactSet Research Systems (NYSE:FDS) is expanding its AI powered banking solutions in partnership with Finster AI, with an alpha launch of its workflow automation platform. The company is rolling out advanced AI Document Search to more than 85,000 users in a broad beta release. FactSet is deepening platform integrations and providing direct access to large language models such as ChatGPT and Claude within its ecosystem. FactSet is widely used across investment banks, asset managers, and...
